# 18.2. Radar Chart (6 axes)

~~~mermaid
---
title: "Grades"
---
radar-beta
  axis m["Math"], s["Science"], e["English"]
  axis h["History"], g["Geography"], a["Art"]
  curve a["Alice"]{85, 90, 80, 70, 75, 90}
  curve b["Bob"]{70, 75, 85, 80, 90, 85}

  max 100
  min 0
~~~
